questionHtml: The three species of bacteria are commonly found on skin. Explain why excessive handwashing with HCP might lead to a P. aeruginosa infection.
markschemeHtml:
a. P. aeruginosa not killed by the HCP
OR
disinfectant kills Gram-positive bacteria/S. aureus ✔ 

b. leading to less competition for P. aeruginosa ✔
